name: Transurban Group
analysis: TCL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$15.3900, stop A$14.4936, target A$18.0792 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
